role: Senior Policy Fellow, European Council on Foreign Relations
bio: Ellie Geranmayeh is a senior policy fellow and deputy head of the Middle East and North Africa programme at the [European Council on Foreign Relations (ECFR)](/orgs/european-council-on-foreign-relations). She was identified as a member of the [Iran Experts Initiative](/events/iei-email-leak-2023), attending the inaugural meeting at Vienna's Palais Coburg in May 2014 alongside other Western-based Iranian academics recruited by the Iranian [Foreign Ministry](/orgs/ministry-of-foreign-affairs) through [IPIS](/orgs/ipis) to promote Tehran's nuclear negotiating positions.
editorial_notes: IEI member. ECFR deputy head of MENA programme.
